title: Tbestmax 300 PCS Mini Cosmetic Spatulas 3.2" x 0.6" Disposable Makeup Spatulas Plastic Spatulas Facial Creams Skin Care Spatulas Multicolor
description:
About this item
【Packaging & Size】 You will receive 300pcs colorful makeup spatulas, suitable for small samples, the size about 3.2" x 0.6", enough for you to use and change.
【Disposable Use】To prevent cross discomfort between customers in the beauty process, keep cosmetics clean.
【Widely Used】It is specially used for applying facial masks, creams, hair removal creams, ointments, etc., instead of directly applying by hand, it is safer.
【Easy to Carry】The makeup spatulas are small, easy to carry, can be easily packed into pockets, bags, suitable for travel, home and personal care.
【Plastic Material】 Compared with wood, plastic do not absorb water, will not cause paste waste, and will not produce scratches on the skin.
reviews_5s: I used to have clear ones, but after dropping them on the floor, they were almost impossible to find. I wish they could be ordered in only one color. But they work great and I have enough to last for years. My only complaint was that there were some clear ones included but that's on me for not looking closer before ordering.We used them in an organza bag with a cookie and a little cup of frosting for our wedding favors. They were a huge hit!I initially bought these for scraping remaining bits from jars, tubes, lipstick containers, etc. They work perfectly. They are also great for filling little travel containers and leveling off the contents. I've also reached for these when crafting. They are helpful for spreading glue and for containing hot glue in one area. I am sure I will find even more uses for them.I only needed one but got a few hundred for the same price! Love the colors & now I’ll never have to buy another one for the rest of my life! lol
